title: Chain 1/8: Meet New Neighbor
scene: 新邻居搬来，你在楼道里打招呼。（对话链：邻里）

turns.en: Hi! I'm new here. I just moved into 502.

turns.cn: 欢迎！我住504，有什么需要帮忙的尽管说。
turns.en: Welcome! I'm in 504. Let me know if you need anything.
Is there a grocery store nearby?

turns.cn: 拐角就有一家，走路五分钟。
turns.en: There's one on the corner, about a five-minute walk.
What day is trash pickup?

turns.cn: 周二和周五早上，晚上十点前放门口。
turns.en: Tuesday and Friday mornings. Put it out before ten PM.

turns.cn: 太感谢了，改天请你喝咖啡！
turns.en: Thanks so much. Coffee on me sometime!

title: Chain 2/8: Borrow Something
scene: 你做蛋糕发现没糖了，去敲邻居的门。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 不好意思打扰了，能借一杯糖吗？
turns.en: Sorry to bother you. Could I borrow a cup of sugar?
Sure, give me a second.
Here you go. Is that enough?
That's perfect. Thank you so much!

turns.cn: 在做甜点吗？闻起来好香。
turns.en: Are you baking? It smells great.

turns.cn: 巧克力蛋糕，做好了给你送一块。
turns.en: Chocolate cake. I'll bring you a slice when it's done.

title: Chain 3/8: Accept a Package
scene: 邻居请你帮忙代收快递。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 我明天不在家，能帮我收个包裹吗？
turns.en: I'll be out tomorrow. Could you accept a package for me?
No problem. What time will it arrive?

turns.cn: 快递说下午两点到六点之间。
turns.en: They said between two and six PM.

turns.cn: 好的，到了我发短信告诉你。
turns.en: Okay. I'll text you when it arrives.
Thanks a lot. I'll pick it up tonight.

turns.cn: 放我门口就行，敲我门拿。
turns.en: I'll leave it by my door. Just knock when you come.

title: Chain 4/8: Noise Complaint
scene: 楼上噪音太大，你礼貌地上门沟通。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 你好，不好意思这么晚来打扰。
turns.en: Hi, sorry to bother you so late.
No worries. What's up?

turns.cn: 音乐声有点大，我明天要早起。
turns.en: The music is a bit loud. I have to get up early tomorrow.
I'm so sorry. We didn't realize.
It's okay. Could you turn it down a little?
Of course. We'll lower it right now.

title: Chain 5/8: Share Tools
scene: 邻居敲门借电钻，你在家。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 能借一下电钻吗？挂个画。
turns.en: Could I borrow your drill? I need to hang a picture.
Sure. It's in the toolbox on the balcony.
What size bit do I need?

turns.cn: 墙上用六号，膨胀螺丝我这也有。
turns.en: Number six for the wall. I have anchors too.
Thanks a lot. I'll return it in half an hour.
No rush. Just leave it by my door when you're done.

title: Chain 6/8: Pet Encounter
scene: 你在小区遛狗，遇见邻居也带着狗。（对话链：邻里）

turns.en: Your dog is adorable. What's their name?
Dou Dou. Three years old. Very friendly.
Can they play together for a bit?

turns.cn: 可以，这有牵绳，公园那边草地大。
turns.en: Sure. I've got a leash. The grass by the park is bigger.
Are you in the building pet group chat?
Not yet. Could you add me?

title: Chain 7/8: Water Leak
scene: 你家厨房漏水渗到楼下，你主动找邻居说明。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 不好意思，我家厨房可能漏水到您家了。
turns.en: Sorry, my kitchen leak may have reached your place.
The ceiling is a bit wet. I just noticed.

turns.cn: 我已经关水阀，物业明天来修。
turns.en: I shut off the valve. Maintenance comes tomorrow.
Should I take photos for the record?

turns.cn: 麻烦拍一下，费用我们负责。
turns.en: Please do. We'll cover the repair costs.
Okay. Call me anytime.

title: Chain 8/8: Holiday Gathering
scene: 中秋节，邻居邀请你参加楼道小聚会。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 周六晚上楼道中秋聚会，你来吗？
turns.en: We're having a Mid-Autumn get-together in the hall Saturday. Coming?
Sure. I'll bring mooncakes.
Just one dish per household is fine.

turns.cn: 几点开始？要帮忙布置吗？
turns.en: What time? Need help setting up?

turns.cn: 七点，六点半来帮忙挂灯就好。
turns.en: Seven PM. Come at six thirty to hang lights.
Great. See you then.
